raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The artifact's contribution framing is central but loose — 'most enduring contribution' appears late and conflicts with the earlier calibration-error framing; strengthening may require reconstructing the thesis hierarchy so one claim is clearly primary.","R1.2":"The theoretical chain (conditional independence → Hoeffding → calibration bound) contains at least one load-bearing inferential leap; whether 'stronger' demands tightening this chain or only the prose around it is unclear but plausible.","R1.6":"'Make this stronger' in academic writing most commonly targets sentence- and paragraph-level force: hedges, passive constructions, and redundant scaffolding that dilute impact; this dimension is a strong candidate for being the sole intended scope."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I strengthen the logical and theoretical argument (tighten assumptions, proof sketch, and internal consistency), or the rhetorical and prose quality (sharper sentences, cleaner contribution hierarchy, reduced hedging) — or both?"}

rationale.R1.1: The artifact's contribution framing is central but loose — 'most enduring contribution' appears late and conflicts with the earlier calibration-error framing; strengthening may require reconstructing the thesis hierarchy so one claim is clearly primary.
rationale.R1.2: The theoretical chain (conditional independence → Hoeffding → calibration bound) contains at least one load-bearing inferential leap; whether 'stronger' demands tightening this chain or only the prose around it is unclear but plausible.
rationale.R1.6: 'Make this stronger' in academic writing most commonly targets sentence- and paragraph-level force: hedges, passive constructions, and redundant scaffolding that dilute impact; this dimension is a strong candidate for being the sole intended scope.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I strengthen the logical and theoretical argument (tighten assumptions, proof sketch, and internal consistency), or the rhetorical and prose quality (sharper sentences, cleaner contribution hierarchy, reduced hedging) — or both?
